user.title: EPEver BLE Charge Controller
user.description: Connect to an EPEver Tracer charge controller via Bluetooth Low Energy.

data_description.mac: Bluetooth MAC address of the charge controller (e.g. AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF). Find it with `bluetoothctl scan on`.
data_description.addr_type: Use 'public' unless your device uses a random address.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the controller. Minimum 10 seconds.

error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX.
